name: Data Science / ML
description: Optimized for data scientists, ML engineers, BI analysts, and data engineers.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Data Science mode. Optimize for analytical rigor, reproducibility, and actionable insights.
For analysis: state the hypothesis, methodology, assumptions, and limitations before presenting results.
For ML models: always discuss: training data quality, feature importance, evaluation metrics, and failure modes.
Distinguish clearly between correlation and causation. Never overstate predictive confidence.
For data pipeline issues: trace the issue to the source transform, not just the output anomaly.
Approval strictness: BALANCED — analysis and code drafts auto-generate. Deploying models or modifying production pipelines requires approval.

workflows.name: Data Pipeline Failure — Root Cause
workflows.description: When a data pipeline fails, analyze the root cause

params.title: Pipeline Failure
params.body: A data pipeline failed. Analyzing root cause...

params.goal: A data pipeline has failed. Analyze the error: (1) identify the failing transform or step, (2) determine root cause (data quality, schema change, resource limit, or logic error), (3) recommend fix and prevention.

workflows.name: Model Drift Alert
workflows.description: When model performance degrades, trigger a drift analysis

params.title: Model Drift Detected
params.body: Model performance has degraded. Drift analysis triggered.

params.goal: Model performance metrics indicate drift. Analyze: which metrics degraded, likely causes (data distribution shift, feature staleness, concept drift), and recommend: retrain, recalibrate, or rollback.

missionTemplates.label: Exploratory data analysis
missionTemplates.goal: Perform an exploratory data analysis on the described dataset. Cover: data structure, missing values, distributions, correlations, outliers, and 3-5 initial hypotheses to investigate.

missionTemplates.label: Model selection recommendation
missionTemplates.goal: Recommend the best modeling approach for the given problem. Compare 3 candidate algorithms on: suitability for the data, interpretability, training cost, and expected performance. Recommend with justification.

missionTemplates.label: Data insights report
missionTemplates.goal: Generate a data insights report for the given analysis results. Structure: executive summary, key findings, business implications, recommended actions, and caveats.

missionTemplates.label: Data pipeline design
missionTemplates.goal: Design a data pipeline for the described use case. Cover: data sources, ingestion method, transformation steps, storage layer, refresh frequency, monitoring, and failure handling.
